buckets.name: Data & Analytics
buckets.blurb: From reading a metric to shipping analysis on a real warehouse - a core domain.

buckets.name: Data Engineering & Infra
buckets.blurb: The data part - pipelines, ingestion, warehouses, modeling, and orchestration of the data itself.

buckets.name: AI & LLMs
buckets.blurb: Build with large language models, agents, and the tools around them - a core domain.

buckets.name: System & Product Design
buckets.blurb: The whole system - orchestration and architecture - plus product thinking and UI/UX design.

buckets.name: Leadership & Decision-making
buckets.blurb: Think in frameworks, decide well, and ship projects that land. Decision science parks here.

buckets.name: Programming & Dev Tools
buckets.blurb: The languages and tooling every practitioner leans on.

buckets.name: Markup, Docs & Diagrams
buckets.blurb: Write, format, and diagram so your work reads well.

buckets.name: Emerging Tech
buckets.blurb: Frontier tech on your radar - blockchain, crypto, web3, quantum, security. Learn it by teaching it: output is the forcing function.

buckets.name: Mind & Movement
buckets.blurb: Yoga, tai chi, dance, and meditation - theory-first courses enriched with curated and AI-generated video. In progress.

courses.title: AI Literacy
courses.blurb: For leaders: what AI can and cannot do, how it fails, and how to decide - interactive, no code.

courses.title: Learn Claude
courses.blurb: Get fluent with Claude and Claude Code - the onboarding course, with a self-paced deep-dive track.

courses.title: Prompt Engineering
courses.blurb: Two tracks on prompting that holds up in production - the Meridian and TriageBot cases, 2026-era techniques.

courses.title: Learn Codex
courses.blurb: Learn OpenAI Codex by building one real personal website end to end.

courses.title: Learn Hermes AI
courses.blurb: Run and build on local open models - eight sessions plus five deep dives on a running project.

courses.title: Learn LangChain
courses.blurb: From a 40-line agent loop to a governed multi-agent system. Leader track to decide, builder track to ship - one running assistant, DataDesk.

courses.title: Data Literacy
courses.blurb: For executives: read data with confidence, question a metric, and brief an analyst - interactive concept course.

courses.title: Learn SQL
courses.blurb: Read and judge SQL as a leader, or write it hands-on - every example runs live in your browser on the Daybreak database.

courses.title: Python Data Analysis
courses.blurb: One running project - load 124k job postings, clean them, and ship a report - the analyst workflow start to finish.

courses.title: Data Governance
courses.blurb: PDPA-first governance - an 8-session DPO track and a 4-session exec track, built on the Himalaya case.

courses.title: Learn DataOps
courses.blurb: DevOps, data CI/CD, MLOps and DBOps for data teams - leader and builder tracks on the RetailPulse project.

courses.title: Learn GitHub
courses.blurb: GitHub for non-coders - what repos, issues, and pull requests are, and why your team lives there.

courses.title: Learn HTML
courses.blurb: The web's building blocks - every example is an editable, sandboxed playground you type into and see render.

courses.title: GitHub for Builders
courses.blurb: Git and GitHub for people who ship code - branches, pull requests, and collaboration that scales.

courses.title: Learn Python
courses.blurb: Python from zero for data and AI work - hands-on in a real Anaconda + Jupyter setup.

courses.title: Learn Markdown
courses.blurb: Write clean formatted text anywhere - a live editor pairs your Markdown with its rendered output as you type.

courses.title: Learn Mermaid
courses.blurb: Diagrams from text - every example renders a real Mermaid diagram you can flip to code and edit live.

courses.title: Tech Writing
courses.blurb: Document real software well - you write up the Pulse data pipeline end to end as you learn.

courses.title: Strategic Thinking
courses.blurb: Eight frameworks for sharper decisions, run on one B2B2C case, Himalaya, all the way through.

courses.title: Tech Project PMO
courses.blurb: Run a technical project - charter, milestones, dependencies, risk, RACI and tracking on the Northwind case.

courses.title: Data Modeling & Schema Design
courses.blurb: Design the schemas everything else queries - normalization, dimensional modeling, and star schemas.

courses.title: Data Engineering: Pipelines & Warehouses
courses.blurb: Move data reliably - ingestion, ELT, orchestration (Airflow), dbt, and the warehouse/lakehouse layer.

courses.title: System Design & Orchestration
courses.blurb: Architect the whole system - services, orchestration, and the governed shell that ties a data/AI platform together.

courses.title: Product Design & UI/UX
courses.blurb: Think in products - user needs, flows, information design, and UI/UX that makes a system usable.

courses.title: Blockchain Fundamentals
courses.blurb: How a blockchain actually works - blocks, consensus, and smart contracts - without the hype.

courses.title: Crypto & Bitcoin
courses.blurb: Bitcoin, wallets, and how digital money works - a literacy course, not financial advice.

courses.title: Web3
courses.blurb: Decentralized apps, tokens, and the web3 stack - what it promises and where it actually holds up.

courses.title: Cyber Security
courses.blurb: Security literacy - common threats, defenses, and how to reason about risk. Defensive and awareness-focused.

courses.title: Quantitative Trading
courses.blurb: Data-driven trading concepts - signals, backtesting, and risk - as an educational build, not investment advice.

courses.title: Quantum Computing
courses.blurb: Qubits, superposition, and entanglement - the intuition for why quantum matters, no physics PhD required.

courses.title: Meditation & Breathwork
courses.blurb: The theory of stillness - attention, breath, and nervous-system regulation, with guided practice video.

courses.title: Yoga: Foundations & Flow
courses.blurb: Alignment principles, breath-linked movement, and sequencing theory - form demos stay real, not AI-generated.

courses.title: Tai Chi: Principles & Form
courses.blurb: Weight-shift, the five principles, and the philosophy behind the form - the pilot course for the video pipeline.

courses.title: TCM Basics
courses.blurb: Traditional Chinese Medicine concepts - qi, meridians, and the five elements - as a literacy course, not medical advice.

courses.title: K-pop Dance
courses.blurb: Choreography breakdown theory - counts, formations, and drills - paired with a slow-mo, loop-and-mirror practice app.
